name: Fair Isaac Corporation
subIndustry: Software & Services - Data Analytics & Decision Management
businessModelSummary: Fair Isaac develops predictive analytics and decision management software platforms that enable organizations to assess credit risk, detect fraud, and manage customer relationships. The company generates revenue through software subscriptions, services, and the licensing of its proprietary FICO Score credit scoring model, which is widely adopted across financial services.
regulators: Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC)
